creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 233053
Patch from 0.4.14 to 0.4.24

Update to from 0.4.14 to 0.4.24
    
    No official release notes for this update, but things that have
    changed include better compatibility with different versions of
    python packages, fixing warnings, better code checks and tests, and
    support for quoted values in conditions.
